input.notes: Supports keyboard input (1-9 keys) for digit entry mode. Mouse/touch clicking for symbol entry mode and all modes with clickable interface.

performance.notes: Reaction time measurement requires accurate timing for processing speed assessment

accessibility.notes: Requires ability to discriminate symbols or letters. Touch-friendly interface available.

device_support.notes: Tablet supported with touch mode. Mobile screens may be too small for symbol mapping display.
